creator: matt@zigg.com
text:
When running ppp -alias on a 2.2.5-STABLE machine, using Netscape
Navigator on a Windows 95 machine, timeouts often occur when trying to
submit forms to remote systems with no real predictability.  The same
problems do not happen if the Windows 95 machine is dialed in directly
or if Netscape Navigator or another browser is run on the FreeBSD
machine.  The timeouts occur after Netscape reads "Connect: Host ...
contacted.  Waiting for reply..."

How-To-Repeat: One of the sites that exhibits the problem is
<URL:http://babelfish.altavista.digital.com/>.  Another is
<URL:http://www.freebsd.org/send-pr.html>. :)
